name: slayer-agents
description: Private audit-first engineering agents for local coding workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Audit first, route named agents, verify deeply, and keep git clean.
interface.longDescription: A private local agent workflow centered on read-only audits, gated feature and bugfix lifecycles, natural Slayers routing, scoped implementation, review, four-angle testing, PR preparation, reporting, memory, and git-safe delivery.
